name: Acushnet Holdings Corp.
business: Acushnet Holdings Corp. designs, develops, manufactures, and distributes performance-driven golf products under the Titleist, FootJoy, and other brands, targeting dedicated golfers who prioritize performance and quality.

exposures.sentence: We are the global leader in the design, development, manufacture and distribution of performance driven golf products, and these products are widely recognized for their quality excellence.

catalysts.event: Launch of new Pro V1x Left Dash golf ball
catalysts.sentence: In early 2026, and for the first time since 2018, we launched a new model of our Pro V1x Left Dash golf ball.

catalysts.event: Launch of new AVX, Tour Soft, and Velocity golf balls
catalysts.sentence: Also in early 2026, we launched new models of our AVX, Tour Soft, and Velocity golf balls.

catalysts.event: Expansion of Alignment Integrated Marking (AIM) features on Titleist golf balls
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to expand and increase the availability of Alignment Integrated Marking (AIM) features on every Titleist golf ball in our portfolio, including tour-validated single line AIM Performance on Pro V1, Pro V1x and Pro V1x Left Dash, AIM 360 on AVX and TruFeel, and select AIM features on Tour Soft and Velocity.

catalysts.event: Spending on global ERP platform in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate spending approximately $30 million to $35 million in total during 2026 related to the deployment of the new global ERP platform.

Capital expenditures in 2026 are expected to be approximately $95.0 million, although actual amounts may vary depending upon a variety of factors, including the timing of certain capital project implementations and receipt of capital purchases due to supply chain challenges.
